---
title: "Analysis of NBA Player Statistics"
author: "Midterm Group 2"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%m-%d-%y')`"
output: html_document
params: 
  production: TRUE
  echo: FALSE
  section: "all"
---
```{r, set-chunk-opts, echo = FALSE, eval = params$production, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(gt)
library(here)
library(kableExtra)

opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE
)
```

```{r, here_i_am, eval = params$production}
here::i_am(
  "report.Rmd"
)
```

```{r, read code}
data <- read_excel(
  here::here("data/nba_data.xlsx")
)
section <- params$section
```

```{r, results = 'asis'}
if (section %in% c("all", "pf")) {
  
  cat("## Personal Fouls Per 36 Minutes by Team\n\n")

anova_p <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/PE_output/PFbT_anova_tbl.rds")
)
sum_table_p <- readRDS(here::here("output/PE_output/PFbT_sum_tbl.rds")
)

boxplot_p <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/PE_output/PFbT_boxplot.rds")
)

bar_p <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/PE_output/PFbT_bar.rds")
)

print(
    knitr::kable(
    as.data.frame(anova_p),
    digits = 3,
    caption = "ANOVA: Personal Fouls by Team"
  )
)

cat("The table above displays the results of a Welch’s One-Way ANOVA test, identifying if there are significant differences in the average number of personal fouls by NBA team.\n\n")


print(
  knitr::kable(
    sum_table_p,
    digits = 2,
    caption = "Personal Fouls by Team"
)
)
cat("The table above displays the average number of personal fouls by NBA team, as well as the standard deviation and count.\n\n")

print(boxplot_p + labs(title = "Personal Fouls per 36 Minutes by Team"))
cat("\n\n\nThe figure above visualizes a 5-number summary of Personal Fouls per 36 minutes by NBA team.\n\n")

print(bar_p + labs(title= "Average Personal Fouls Per 36 Minutes by Team"))
cat("\n\n\nThe figure above visualizes the average number of personal fouls per 36 minutes by NBA team.\n\n")
}
```

```{r, results='asis'}
if (section %in% c("all", "fg")) {
  
   cat("## Position and 3-Point Field Goal Attempts\n\n")
  
table_s <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/sl_output/table_one.rds")
)

tukey_s <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/sl_output/tukey_table.rds")
)

boxplot_s <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/sl_output/boxplot.rds")
)

print(table_s)
cat("The table above is a summary table of the 5 positions and the 3-point field goal attempts per position.\n\n")

print(knitr::kable(as.data.frame(tukey_s), digits = 3))
cat("The table above produces the results of the One-Way Anova Test. In the Significance column, the ones that have an asterisk signifies that there is a significant difference within that contrast group.\n\n")

print(boxplot_s)

cat("\n\n\nThe bar plot above displays a graphical representation of the Tukey Table and our Anova Test results. It makes it easy to visualize which positions in regards to 3-point field goal attempts are different.\n\n")
}
```

```{r, results='asis'}
if (section %in% c("all", "asa")) {
  
  cat("## All Star Awards by Position\n\n")
  
summary_tablee <- read.csv(
  here::here("output/em_output/table1_summary.csv")
)

chi_tablee <- read.csv(
  here::here("output/em_output/chi_square_table.csv")
)

chi_resultse <- read.csv(
  here::here("output/em_output/chi_square_results.csv")
)

bar_e <- knitr::include_graphics(
  here::here("output/em_output/Position_AS_barchart.png")
)

print(knitr::kable(summary_tablee, caption = "Summary Table"))
cat("The table above shows the distribution of players with All-Star awards across positions.\n\n")

print(knitr::kable(chi_tablee, caption = "Chi-Squared Table"))
cat("The chi-square table above displays the test results of the chi-square test. It shows whether All-Star award status is associated with player position.\n\n")

print(knitr::kable(chi_resultse, caption = "Chi-Squared Results"))
cat("These results above show no statistically significant association between player position and All-Star status.\n\n")

cat("![](", here::here("output/em_output/Position_AS_barchart.png"), ")\n\n", sep = "")

cat("The bar chart above visualizes the number of players with All-Star awards across the different positions.\n\n")
}
```

```{r, results='asis'}
if (section %in% c("all", "games")) {
  
   cat("## Games Started and 3-Pointers & Free Throws\n\n")
  
summary1 <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/output_mm/summary_3p_mm.rds")
  )

scatterplot1 <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/output_mm/scatterplot_3pbgs_mm.rds")
  )

summary2 <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/output_mm/summary_ft_mm.rds")
  )

scatterplot2 <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/output_mm/scatterplot_ftbgs_mm.rds")
)

print(knitr::kable(
  summary1$coefficients, 
  caption = "3PT Model Results")
  )
cat("Contains the statistical summary of a linear regression model on whether the number of games started is a signifier for the total number of 3-pointers. \n\n")

print(scatterplot1)
cat("\n\n\nVisualizes the relationship between games started (GS) and 3-pointers made. \n\n")

print(knitr::kable(
  summary2$coefficients, 
  caption = "Free Throw Model Results")
  )
cat("\n\n\nThis stores the regression model analyzing the impact of games started on players' free-throw percentages.\n\n")

print(scatterplot2)
cat("\n\n\nVisualizes the relationship between games started and free throw percentages.\n\n")
}
```
